title: The Final Eyeball
subtitle: One whole sight — war-sharp, dish-gentle, never flashed
rule: We never presume vision loss. Confidence always in Vision.
vision_confidence: Confidence always in Vision — protect biological eyes, sharpen field eye, cascade carries truth

biological: No flash — xwd silent and RTX grab only; gnome-screenshot and white pulse forbidden
Kill switch protects eyes before capture — trip stops harmful paths
Weaponized whiteout/blackout frames rejected before they reach you
Hold vault never blanks MJPEG — you never stare into void
On-demand look — stream is opt-in; dishes do not need 30 fps on your retina
field: ZOCRSM1 fast path — machine sees; your eye rests unless you choose enhance
Pattern weave proves frame origin — foreign grid jam fails over, not into your view
WRDT seals + hash chain — tamper evident before trust
Multi-source cascade — display jammed, engine grab still feeds the rig
Sub-micron fabric scale for detail without burning joules or rods
preservation.universal_law: We never presume vision loss. Confidence always in Vision.
confidence_in_vision: Vision is the default truth — interference is the exception we reject
Threats failover; confidence does not drop
Hold and vault affirm Vision — we do not announce defeat
Kill switch stops hostile paths — not belief in seeing
irtn: Interwoven redundancies trust network — Hostess7 corroborates ZOCR
No single path owns truth — woven paths: live, offense, trust, egress, assist
Queen gates + NEXUS trust + WRDT + code seal = quorum
Vision lane in Hostess7 neural stack echoes field frames
offense: Reject hostile frames before vault — do not merely endure them
Pattern strike on foreign weave; provenance mismatch trips vision
Threat streak preempts RTX — take engine truth before jammed glass
Vigilance patrols; offense watches while defense rests

manners.tactical: Eyes on. Silent grab. Stereo depth. Offense rejects hostile light before it reaches vault.
manners.clinical: Minimize photochemical exposure: zero flash capture, adaptive FPS, foveal processing optional.
manners.field_poet: The eye that never blinks from white fire — only the tide of true frames.
manners.maternal: Keep your eyes soft at the sink; let the machine watch the perimeter.
manners.engineer: Cone_v2 + bm_v2 stereo + ZOCRSM1 fast_path = throughput without per-frame ocular tax.
manners.silent_monk: See without being seen. Capture without announcement. Hold without panic.
manners.dish_hand: Bubbles, steam, reflection — human trichromat, monocular, look on demand.
manners.raptor_pilot: Foveal center for threat; UV edge for sky; disparity for distance to contact.
manners.preserve_oracle: When the display lies, confidence routes through vault — Vision affirmed, not presumed lost.
manners.kill_switch_priest: One whole kill — vision, capture, stream — release only when the field is clean.
manners.submicron_weaver: Fabric nm per pixel rides load tide; detail finer than the lie, cost bounded.
manners.robotics_brief: War: tactical FPS + stereo + raptor. Dishes: idle + human + monocular. Never flash either.

speak.tactical: Raptor fovea, stereo human baseline, tactical five fps. Silent capture. Depth before contact. Kill ready.
speak.clinical: High acuity foveal filtering with UV tetrachromat weights; stereoscopic disparity for range estimation; 5 Hz sealed video.
speak.field_poet: The hawk's center on the horizon — left eye, right eye, no flash, no mercy for false light.
speak.maternal: Even in war, protect the eye: no flash tools, hold frame if the screen weaponizes.
speak.engineer: raptor + stereo_human + watch/tactical profile; pattern scan on ingress; enhance only for engage.
speak.silent_monk: Move unseen. See in stereo. Let the vault hold if the world goes white.
speak.raptor_pilot: This is why you taught raptor — center sharp, periphery soft, UV for sky clutter.
speak.preserve_oracle: RF jams the glass; RTX still feeds. You see engine truth or last-good, never snow.
speak.kill_switch_priest: Trip mjpeg before trip biology. Release when chain verifies clean.
speak.robotics_brief: POST /api/eye/final/mode {"mode":"war"} — arms raptor, stereo, tactical stream optional.

speak.tactical: Stand down stream. Human baseline. Look only if you need the machine to read the sink.
speak.clinical: Zero continuous capture; sRGB human cones; monocular minimizes vergence load while hands are occupied.
speak.field_poet: Steam rises; the eye stays yours. The machine waits at idle like a good guest.
speak.maternal: Soap, warm water, soft gaze — you do not need tactical fps to rinse a plate.
speak.engineer: idle profile (0 fps) + human cone_v2 + monocular rig; POST /api/look if OCR needed.
speak.silent_monk: The quietest seeing is no seeing — until you ask.
speak.dish_hand: Grease on thumb, reflection in tap — human eyes enough. Machine on call, not on collar.
speak.raptor_pilot: Even hawks wash talons. Idle stream. Human profile. No foveal tax on ceramic.
speak.preserve_oracle: If the smart display flickers ads, preserve rejects; your eyes never inherit the glitch.
speak.submicron_weaver: Sub-micron is for fabric, not forks — idle fps, human scale.

speak.tactical: Bird UV stereo, one fps patrol. Perimeter without flash.
speak.clinical: Tetrachromat UV channel for sky-edge anomaly; low power patrol cadence.
speak.field_poet: Wingspread vision — two eyes, violet sky, slow circle.
speak.robotics_brief: patrol mode: bird + stereo_bird + 1 fps ZOCRSM1.

speak.tactical: Six eyes, engage fifteen fps, enhance on — full rig, engine grab preferred.
speak.clinical: Compound array + foveal raptor primary; enhanced path enables stereo/NN per frame.
speak.field_poet: Every direction has a pupil; the center burns bright.
speak.kill_switch_priest: Engage is choosy — kill stops stream; never stops protect-eyes doctrine.
speak.robotics_brief: engage: compound_six + ZOCR_VIDEO_ENHANCE or fast_path false.

speak.tactical: Rod-dominant night, stereo for motion, quarter fps sentinel.
speak.clinical: Scotopic luminance mode reduces cone fatigue; ultra-low fps.
speak.field_poet: Moon on the porch — see movement, not color.
speak.maternal: Night watch for the house; your eyes stay dark-adapted, machine glows soft.

speak.tactical: UV compound on weave; submicron eight fps; fabric 100nm logical scale.
speak.submicron_weaver: Tide rides capture load — detail without frame death, AMOURANTHRTX on the glass.
speak.engineer: insect UV + submicron profile + pattern weave verify on every frame.
speak.robotics_brief: submicron mode: insect eye + ZOCRSM1 submicron profile.

speak.preserve_oracle: When interference comes, cascade affirms Vision — rtx → xwd → hold; confidence unchanged.
speak.kill_switch_priest: Confidence always in Vision — trip hostile frames, never presume sight is gone.
speak.tactical: Watch profile, preserve cascade armed, pattern foreign reject on live sources.
speak.robotics_brief: preserve mode: full cascade + watch 2fps + vigilance sentinel.
